title: Fix Gemini API 404 Error - Correct Endpoint URL and Request Format

requirements.summary: Hardcode correct Gemini Vision API endpoint URL with proper structure and query parameter handling
acceptanceCriteria: The Gemini endpoint URL in apiConfig.ts is exactly `https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/gemini-1.5-flash:generateContent`.
The `buildGeminiUrl` function appends `?key=<apiKey>` to the base URL.
No dynamic segment construction that could omit `/v1beta/`, the model name, or `:generateContent`.
Inline comments document each required URL component (base host, API version, model name, method suffix, key query param).

file_operations.description: Replace the `buildGeminiUrl` function to use the hardcoded endpoint URL `https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/gemini-1.5-flash:generateContent` with `?key=<apiKey>` appended as a query parameter. Remove any dynamic URL construction logic that could produce malformed URLs. Add inline comments documenting: (1) base host, (2) API version `/v1beta/`, (3) model name `gemini-1.5-flash`, (4) method suffix `:generateContent`, and (5) query parameter `?key=<apiKey>`. Ensure the function returns the complete URL with the API key properly encoded.

requirements.summary: Send Gemini API requests using correct JSON body format with base64-encoded image data
acceptanceCriteria: Requests to Gemini use `fetch` with `Content-Type: application/json` and a JSON body — no FormData.
The request body contains a `contents[0].parts` array with a text part (prompt) and an `inlineData` part (mimeType + base64 data).
The base64-encoded image data is correctly extracted from the File/Blob before sending.
A successful POST to the correct endpoint returns a 200 response with Gemini analysis output.

file_operations.description: Replace the Gemini API request logic to use `fetch` with `method: 'POST'`, `Content-Type: application/json`, and a JSON-stringified body matching the structure: `{ contents: [{ parts: [{ text: <prompt> }, { inlineData: { mimeType: <mimeType>, data: <base64Data> } }] }] }`. Remove any FormData or multipart/form-data approach for the Gemini provider. Extract the base64-encoded image data from the File/Blob by reading it as a Data URL, stripping the prefix, and placing the raw base64 string in `inlineData.data`. Ensure the `mimeType` field matches the actual image MIME type (e.g., 'image/jpeg', 'image/png', 'image/webp'). Verify the prompt text is included in the first part of the `parts` array.

requirements.summary: Display actionable Portuguese 404 error message with navigation to Settings
acceptanceCriteria: When a 404 HTTP error is returned by the Gemini API, the ProcessingScreen displays the Portuguese 404-specific error message.
An 'Ir para Configurações' button is rendered below the error message.
Clicking 'Ir para Configurações' navigates to the Settings page.
Other non-404 HTTP errors still display their existing error messages.

file_operations.description: Add explicit detection for HTTP 404 errors returned by the Gemini API. When a 404 is detected, display the Portuguese error message: 'Endpoint da API não encontrado (404). Verifique se a URL e o modelo estão configurados corretamente nas Configurações.' Render a button labeled 'Ir para Configurações' below the error message that navigates to the Settings page using TanStack Router navigation. Preserve existing error handling for non-404 HTTP errors and other error types (missing API key, general failures). Ensure the 404 error state is visually distinct and actionable.
